states.name: Callen
states.title: Magical Dragon Girl
states.description: Once, there was a girl known as a remarkable intellect even among the elven tribes. She was one of the very few chosen to work under the Celestial Lord in the laboratories of the Castle. Though arrogant, she had a strong sense of duty and righteousness, and swore to uphold her grand mission: to save the world.

states.name: Callen
states.title: Magical Dragon Girl
states.description: However, it didn't take long for her to realize that the laboratory's purpose wasn't what she had in mind. She sought to rescue the world from the evil that plagued it; her superiors, however, only desired greater power and greater profit. The doubt in her heart grew day by day, until the day of catastrophe arrived, and her fears were realized.

states.name: Callen
states.title: Magical Dragon Girl
states.description: She ran, to avoid being found out, but also to avoid meeting anyone. She couldn't bear to look anyone in the eye, with the guilt she felt gnawing away at her heart. She went to ground, and immersed herself once more in her forbidden research. And after hundreds of years alone, years of desperate experimentation and sacrifice, she may finally hold the answer.
